narration: What if I told you the sun has a bubble around it?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if I told you the sun has a bubble around it?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you the sun has a bubble around it?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What if I told you the sun has a bubble around it?

narration: This bubble is called the heliosphere, and it protects us from harmful cosmic rays.
visual_description: Context visual: This bubble is called the heliosphere, and it protects us from harmful cosmic rays.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This bubble is called the heliosphere, and it protects us from harmful cosmic rays.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This bubble is called the heliosphere, and it protects us from harmful cosmic rays.

narration: The solar wind creates this protective shield, extending far beyond Pluto.
visual_description: Escalation visual: The solar wind creates this protective shield, extending far beyond Pluto.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: The solar wind creates this protective shield, extending far beyond Pluto.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: The solar wind creates this protective shield, extending far beyond Pluto.

narration: But what happens when cosmic rays breach it?
visual_description: Evidence visual: But what happens when cosmic rays breach it?
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: But what happens when cosmic rays breach it?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: But what happens when cosmic rays breach it?

narration: They can affect our technology and even our climate. Isn’t that wild?
